{% extends "!base.html" %} {# Advertise each page's Markdown twin (generated by sphinx_llm) to AI agents. Safeguards: only when the markdown build ran (llms_txt_enabled), only for real source pages (page_source_suffix excludes genindex/search), and only when a canonical URL exists (pageurl). The href mirrors sphinx_llm's url-suffix layout: dirhtml collapses "
/index" to "
.md" (handled by stripping the trailing slash off pageurl), and the site root maps to "index.md". #} {%- block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {%- if llms_txt_enabled and page_source_suffix and pageurl %} {%- if pagename == "index" %} {%- else %} {%- endif %} {%- endif %} {%- endblock %}
